subject: Fwd: weekend work
body:
Pendo, are customers who actually ordered from performance POS.
We now need to fold this data into DepotChaos as well as our Performance
Depot dashboard
so we can project customer contact. This covers several months, how
customer paid, who did not pay, when they paid and sales totals as well as
department.
